# reloadData()

**Instance Method**

Refreshes the data that the framework uses.

## Declaration

```swift
func reloadData() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

Returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the data reloads, or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if an error occurs.

## Loading and Unloading Data

- **unloadData()**: Unloads the data that the framework uses.
